name: Microwave Parmesan Herb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Line a 12-muffin muffin tin with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, sage leaves, buttermilk powder, and grated Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
4. Add hot water, butter, and egg; stir just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Microwave Directions:
1. Prepare the muffin batter as directed above.
2. Using a 6-cup microwave-safe muffin pan, line each cup with two paper baking cups to absorb moisture during baking.
3. Fill the lined cups about half full.
4. Sprinkle the top of each muffin with cornflake crumbs.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, rotating the pan halfway through cooking.
6. Remove muffins from the pan and discard the outer paper baking cups.
7. Cool the muffins for one minute on a wire rack before serving. Repeat with remaining batter.
